seo.title: Product Walkthrough | See Able Assess in Action | Able Care
seo.description: See Able Assess in action. Video walkthrough and step-by-step guide to the screening workflow.

blocks.headline: See Able Assess in action.
blocks.subtitle: Watch the full screening workflow from sensor setup to results review. Under four minutes from unboxing to first screening.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Able Assess running on a tablet next to the GripAble sensor

blocks.heading: Video walkthrough
blocks.body:
Video embed will be added here. The full walkthrough covers the complete Able Assess experience in under four minutes.

  • Sensor unboxing and charging (30 seconds)
  • Staff training overview (30 seconds)
  • Live screening demonstration (90 seconds)
  • Results review and interpretation (30 seconds)
  • Sharing results with care teams (30 seconds)

steps.title: Unbox and Download App (5 minutes)
steps.description: The sensor and charger arrive in a single box. Charge the sensor, download the Able Assess app, and create your account.

steps.title: Watch Training Video (15 minutes)
steps.description: The training video covers sensor use, correct positioning for each assessment, and how to interpret results.

steps.title: Select Person and Run Screening (5 minutes)
steps.description: Open the app, select the person being screened, confirm consent, and guide them through the balance and strength movements.

steps.title: Results Appear Instantly (1 minute)
steps.description: The risk score, concerning measures, and personalized recommendations are available immediately after the screening is complete.

steps.title: Review and Share (2 minutes)
steps.description: Review results on the dashboard. Share via encrypted link, EHR integration, or printed report. All data is stored securely for longitudinal tracking.

items.title: Real-Time Results
items.description: Falls risk is assessed in the moment during screening. No waiting for lab results or external analysis.

items.title: Simple Interface
items.description: Select a person, hand them the sensor, review results. No complex setup or specialist training required.

items.title: Portable and Reliable
items.description: A small, lightweight sensor that works in any care setting. No specialized equipment or dedicated space needed.

items.title: Regulatory Ready
items.description: Results are documented automatically and available for EHR export. Suitable for CQC, NICE, and HHVBP reporting.

blocks.heading: Ready to see it live?
blocks.bodyText: Book a live demonstration with our clinical team. We will walk you through the full workflow using your care setting as the context.

blocks.heading: Able Assess User Guide
blocks.promoBody: The complete operator manual for Able Assess. Covers sensor setup, the screening workflow, interpreting results and sharing data with care teams.
